sentences.arabic: يَمْتَازُ المَطْبَخُ العَرَبِيُّ بِتَنَوُّعِ الأَطْبَاقِ وَلَذَّتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Arapska kuhinja se odlikuje raznolikošću i ukusnošću jela.
sentences.translationEn: Arab cuisine is characterized by a variety of delicious dishes.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ النَّاسُ تَنَاوُلَ الكَبْسَةِ فِي الخَلِيجِ وَالكُسْكُسِي فِي المَغْرِبِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi vole jesti kabsu u Zaljevu i kuskus u Magrebu.
sentences.translationEn: People love eating kabsa in the Gulf and couscous in the Maghreb.

sentences.arabic: تُسْتَخْدَمُ التَّوَابِلُ المُلَوَّنَةُ لِإِعْطَاءِ الطَّعَامِ نَكْهَةً خَاصَّةً.
sentences.translation: Šareni začini se koriste kako bi hrani dali poseban ukus.
sentences.translationEn: Colorful spices are used to give the food a special flavor.

sentences.arabic: تَجْتَمِعُ العَائِلَةُ حَوْلَ المَائِدَةِ فِي وَقْتِ الغَدَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica se okuplja oko stola u vrijeme ručka.
sentences.translationEn: The family gathers around the table at lunchtime.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ اللَّحَظَاتُ تُقَوِّي العَلَاقَاتِ بَيْنَ الأَقَارِبِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi trenuci jačaju veze među rođacima.
sentences.translationEn: These moments strengthen the relationships between relatives.
